calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:07am
Judge Pro Tem David Edward May, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Natalia Gorobets, appears through counsel, Michael J. Smith; Respondent, Che Man Cheung, appears through counsel, Sze-Hang Lo.
Counsel present their respective cases, and examine an cross-examine parties, respectively.
Connie Li, a friend of Mr. Cheung, is present to interpret Chinese into English, and English into Chinese for Mr. Cheung. Natalia Ozernoy, unrelated to the Respondent, helps interpret Russian into English and English into Russian. Neither person helping with interpretations is a certified interpreter.
11:15am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence was identified or admitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Judgment Entered
